title: Telephone Facilities * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Telephone Facilities * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Families Homeless Youth Pregnant Individuals Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS OUTREACH OUTREACH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Walk-in center providing referrals, food, clothing, DME, camping basic needs, and water for anyone experiencing homelessness or extremely low-income. Conducts outreach to veterans and non-veterans living in homeless camps by providing potable water, food, clothing, phone/fax services,gas vouchers (once per year), ordering DD214 documents for veterans, and facilitating connection to veterans services. 61510 S Highway 97 Suite 100 Bend, OR 977023706 Eligibility: Veterans who are homeless or at imminent risk of homelessness, who need to be screened for eligibility for programs and connection to services for housing, medical, employment and more. Street Outreach services are available for veteran and non-veteran homeless and low-income individuals and households. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3:45pm Email (541) 383-2793 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIACARE SERVICES VETERANS RESOURCE CENTER VETERAN RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides hygiene items, a temproary mailing address, telephone and computer use, housing assistance, case management services, and information and referral to other community partners. 601 N Grape Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Veterans and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 779-8564 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS OUTREACH OUTREACH CENTER COLUMBIACARE SERVICES VETERAN RESOURCE CENTER
